前路漫漫亦灿灿","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1kMXmm9XHzvTfgQbRXu9TpBtUxMBFdwqHjegHDQxrxY","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/bc6341e5719044e3824adf6134c6fbb8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704110&x-signature=s1qfSj0SImkDUWCO7DSpv2sBsUk%3D","user_id":"2704409767460360","user_name":"纯白次方"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2704409767460360","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7148707593811135526","book_info":{"abstract":"【末世+狠人+系统空间+囤货+基建+女强+金手指巨粗！】
末世挣扎了十年的狠人韩清夏在丧尸围城中被基地背叛，眼一睁，她重回末世前半个月！
此时她渣爹渣奶奶后妈还在为她哥哥结婚逼她腾房，韩清夏这次果断把房超低价卖给了他们。
他们沾沾自喜捡大漏时，韩清夏拿着钱去疯狂囤物资！
在超级基地系统的超强金手指辅助下。
韩清夏的无敌避难所搭建好了。
所有人都深陷丧尸危机时，韩清夏在避难所里安稳度假。
所有人都食不果腹时，韩清夏的狗天天吃自助！
所有人苦苦挣扎挤进幸存者聚集地担惊受怕时，韩清夏的基地已经是全世界最牢固的钢铁城堡！

主角在相应场景中的反应也很棒，始终明确目标，不断自强自立，做事点到为止，堪称吾辈楷模。
同时后期提到的各种经济发展观念着实让人眼前一亮，比起无脑嘎嘎乱杀，这种混合着长期发展的剧情更合我意。
为此给予五星。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1668842192,"group_id":"7148707593811135526","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"来人间尝尝味道","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2OHHnup3xMLvTly9oMo4V0=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e53848680f354779adecd26564fe521d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702560&x-signature=8lLYSapYazhlaCO4x2W1bcyBd%2B4%3D","user_id":"110520843404","user_name":"十克花椒"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110520843404","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7148707593811135526","book_info":{"abstract":"【末世+狠人+系统空间+囤货+基建+女强+金手指巨粗！】
